message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array of 3 objects, one per question. Each object has keys: "question" (string: "Chapters", "Description", or "Structure"), "feedback" (text), "complies" (boolean). Evaluate the given text.

The text is an introduction section of a thesis. The questions:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text does not list chapters; it just has introduction content. So compliance: false. Feedback: It doesn't list main sections.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? The text does not describe contents of sections; it's just introduction. So false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No, because no structure indicated. So false.

But maybe we can note some partial strengths: It introduces problem, context, constraints. But still not chapters or structure.

Thus produce JSON array.

Ensure correct JSON format. No extra text.
